text.title: work-breakdown-structure Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for work-breakdown-structure as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: WBS tree without a Dictionary — just numbered labels.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Numbered labels without definitions leave ownership, acceptance criteria, and scope boundaries undefined. The PM interprets everything; the team guesses.

failure-mode.description: Dates or assignees in the WBS tree structure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The WBS answers "what"; the schedule answers "when"; the RACI answers "who". Mixing them forces WBS changes every time the schedule shifts.
